name: /promote-standard rejects re-promotion of a section already present in the active rule set
command:
mkdir -p standards/snapshots active-rules && printf 'sections:
  5.2.4: x
' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.yaml && printf 'rule_id: owasp-asvs-5-2-4
' > active-rules/owasp-asvs-5-2-4.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/promote-standard.sh" owasp-asvs 5.2.4 --snapshot standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.yaml --rules-out active-rules 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'already_promoted' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
